ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1st, 2nd, or 3rd) */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger survived (1 = Yes, 0 = No) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings or spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents or children aboard */,
  "ticket" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Ticket fare */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin number */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation (C = Cherbourg, Q = Queenstown, S = Southampton) */,
  "boat" INTEGER /* Lifeboat number (if any) */,
  "body" REAL /* Body identification number (if applicable) */,
  "home_dest" TEXT /* Home destination of the passenger */,
  "has_cabin_number" INTEGER /* Indicates if the passenger had a cabin number */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the passenger */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Family ID (if part of a family) */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of ticket (e.g., first-class, second-class, third-class) */,
  "cabin_type" TEXT /* Type of cabin (e.g., single, shared, luxury) */,
  "death_cause" TEXT /* Cause of death (if applicable) */,
  "survival_time" REAL /* Time it took for the passenger to survive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number associated with the passenger */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid for the ticket */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger who purchased the ticket */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was purchased */,
  "purchase_location" TEXT /* Location where the ticket was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifeboats" (
  "boat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifeboat */,
  "boat_number" TEXT /* Number assigned to the lifeboat */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the lifeboat */,
  "occupied" INTEGER /* Number of passengers onboard when the lifeboat left */,
  "survived_count" INTEGER /* Count of passengers who survived from this lifeboat */,
  "launch_time" TEXT /* Time when the lifeboat was launched */,
  "rescue_time" TEXT /* Time when the lifeboat was rescued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survivor_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class associated with the statistic */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the passengers */,
  "survived_count" INTEGER /* Number of survivors in this category */,
  "total_count" INTEGER /* Total number of passengers in this category */,
  "survival_rate" REAL /* Calculated survival rate (survived_count / total_count) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the survivors (e.g., child, adult, elderly) */,
  "survival_rate_by_age" REAL /* Survival rate for each age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "embarkation_ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_code" TEXT /* Code for the port (C, Q, S) */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the port is located */,
  "port_address" TEXT /* Address of the port */,
  "port_coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the port */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabin_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabin assignment */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger assigned to the cabin */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin number assigned to the passenger */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the cabin was assigned */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the cabin assignment (e.g., assigned, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cabin_assignments_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Name of the family */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Size of the family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_members" (
  "family_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family member */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the family ID */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger ID */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship to the family (e.g., parent, child, sibling) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_members_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_members_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_id") REFERENCES families ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ship_info" (
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the ship */,
  "ship_name" TEXT /* Name of the ship */,
  "ship_type" TEXT /* Type of the ship */,
  "ship_size" INTEGER /* Size of the ship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disaster_info" (
  "disaster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the disaster */,
  "disaster_name" TEXT /* Name of the disaster */,
  "disaster_date" TEXT /* Date of the disaster */,
  "disaster_description" TEXT /* Description of the disaster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disaster_id")
)
